name.en: Fist the Star Protector's Roaring Gauntlet
name.ja: <ruby>救<rt>きゅう</rt></ruby><ruby>惺<rt>せい</rt></ruby>の<ruby>轟<rt>ごう</rt></ruby><ruby>拳<rt>けん</rt></ruby> フィスト

effect.en: Excavate the top 4 cards of your Deck. You can send 1 excavated "Star Protector Awakening" to the Graveyard. Place the other cards on the bottom of the Deck in any order. If you sent a card to the Graveyard, you can Fusion Summon "Fist the Contractor of the Imprisoned Dragon" by sending monsters from your hand or field to the Graveyard as material, including this card.
